title: Brain Test Tricky Puzzles
description: Brain Test Tricky Puzzles is a fun and smart 2D quiz puzzle game for kids. You have to solve different but simple questions about math, match, differences, or other puzzles in a limited time. They have clear and specific targets. If you need help, you can press the hint button and watch ads. I hope you will love and beat 102 levels and challenge your brain for fun!
